appliedUpdates.description: Added testing milestone assertions and environment issue documentation

environmentIssue: The Execute tool's fireAndForget mode does not properly persist background processes on Windows. Electron app starts successfully but exits when the shell terminates. Workaround: Use foreground timeout (120s) to start app - DevTools listening message confirms successful startup.
recommendation: Manual testing required or environment needs fix for background process persistence
